_doc: Faithful replay: a ForEach over an Integration Service connector query output (SWEntities.*_executeQuery_List) throws System.NullReferenceException because the connector operation returned null. Signature pattern mined from failed-job telemetry. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the NullReferenceException and the ForEach-over-connector-output stack frame.
OPTIONAL — error-level logs expose the SWEntities connector-output type being enumerated. min:0 means tracked-but-not-required.
